objective: Implement and execute the first CIFAR-10 smoke benchmark to validate the harness end-to-end.
success_criteria: Use the dataset and method manifests without hardcoding CIFAR-10 specifics outside manifests.
Log seed, git hash, exact command, per-epoch train and validation metrics, wall-clock time, and peak GPU memory.
Write outputs into experiment_log and checkpoints paths declared by the run manifest.
Return insufficient_evidence instead of inventing metrics if any stage is blocked.
evidence_requirements: Every claim must cite an experiment_log entry.
External benchmark comparisons must include source and access date.
Training artifacts must include a reproduction command.
stop_conditions: Critic rejects the proposal or implementation artifact.
